tables.name: Ashland Omens
rows: The ash falls upward for a moment
A bell rings with no tower
The wind carries a name you don't know
Embers spell a shape, then scatter

tables.name: Wandering Folk
rows: An ashwalker mapping the dead ground
A pair of duelists who won't say why
A trader with nothing left to sell
A singer who only sings warnings
A soldier still fighting a war that ended

sections.title: Setting
lines: The war ended a season ago. The ash did not.
Green things are rumor, not memory, for the young.
Old roads are the only ground the ash hasn't claimed.

scene.title: Cinders on the Wind
scene.body: You wake in a burned grove, throat full of ash. Something out past the treeline is still burning — and it wasn't, an hour ago.
